notes: Gate 4 admission-boundary cleanup slice completed for the packed-i4 low-precision resource/schedule/target validation path. Stable compiler/resource facts are candidate selection, planning contract, dtype/SEW/LMUL, packed-i4 load/unpack, primitive product/reduction, resource cost, schedule decision, realization/region/live-vector facts, target capability mirrors, legality, and rejection reason. Generic policy-output facts are selected-dispatch case/fallback mirrors plus RVVLowPrecisionPerformancePolicyDecision route/correctness/performance/path outputs. Campaign evidence/admission facts are performance feedback/baseline/speedup/action, remediation narratives and measurement evidence, performance admission closure/reopen, beyond-local repair admission, performance maturity, and same-target measurement records. Production cleanup removed Gate 4 admission-field dependency from the packed-i4 stable Gearbox schedule-decision helper and split target artifact validation into stable resource-mirror consumption plus Gate 4 evidence/admission mirror consumption. Accepted dequant and dequant-clamp no-win records still preserve correctness fallback, route support, and correctness execution while denying performance-preferred path selection and performance-win claims. Macro task remains active for remaining Gate 4 measured-win admission and final provider, selected-dispatch, target mirror, and dispatch/fallback closure.
